title: mariscus xanthocarpus
intro: Mariscus xanthocarpus, also known as yellow-fruited club-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family, Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mariscus xanthocarpus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal capsules or tinctures.
